metadata.name: Process a Utility Bill Received via EDI

description: A large utility provider sends its monthly invoices via an EDI 810 transaction. The system needs to process this electronic invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's system ingests the electronic invoice file.

nodes.task_description: Parse the EDI transaction and map the data to the fields of an AP invoice in the ERP system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully parses the EDI data and creates a draft invoice.

nodes.task_description: Automatically code the invoice to the correct utility expense account based on pre-defined rules and post it for payment.

expected_outcome.value: The system automatically codes and posts the invoice without manual intervention.
